posts.title: Venezuelan Podium at Silverstone: Strong GB4 Debut
posts.summary: A composed debut weekend in GB4 with front-running pace, a podium result and a clear statement of intent.
posts.body:
Silverstone marked a major step in the journey: the first GB4 race weekend and an immediate podium result.

The weekend showed calm execution, strong adaptation to single-seater racing and the ability to fight near the front from the start.

For Emmilio, the result was not just a podium. It was proof that the next chapter has properly begun.

posts.title: GB4: The Next Step
posts.summary: The step into GB4 with Elite Motorsport marks the next chapter of the single-seater journey.
posts.body:
The move into GB4 represents a serious step forward in Emmilio Valentino Del Grosso’s racing career.

With Elite Motorsport, the focus is clear: learn fast, adapt to the single-seater platform and build momentum through the season.

This is the next stage of the road towards the highest levels of motorsport.

posts.title: Donington: The Final Fight
posts.summary: A tough but important final round, showing progress, racecraft and resilience at the end of the season.
posts.body:
Donington closed the Ginetta Junior season with a weekend that showed the progress made across the year.

The results did not tell the full story, but the racecraft, pace and confidence were clear compared to the beginning of the season.

It was a hard final fight and an important step before moving into single-seaters.
